content.text:
As of 11:48 AM Japan Standard Time (JST) on Saturday, February 28, 2026, the weather in Tokyo is mostly sunny with a temperature of 66°F (19°C).

## Weather for Tokyo, Japan:
Current Conditions: Mostly sunny, 66°F (19°C)

Daily Forecast:
* Saturday, February 28: Low: 46°F (8°C), High: 68°F (20°C), Description: Warm with clouds yielding to sun; windy this afternoon
* Sunday, March 1: Low: 49°F (10°C), High: 63°F (17°C), Description: Partly sunny
* Monday, March 2: Low: 47°F (8°C), High: 56°F (14°C), Description: Cooler with low clouds
* Tuesday, March 3: Low: 44°F (6°C), High: 50°F (10°C), Description: Periods of rain
* Wednesday, March 4: Low: 42°F (5°C), High: 55°F (13°C), Description: Mostly sunny
* Thursday, March 5: Low: 42°F (6°C), High: 58°F (14°C), Description: Partly sunny
* Friday, March 6: Low: 43°F (6°C), High: 55°F (13°C), Description: Cloudy

Severe Weather Alerts:
* Shinjuku-ku: Gale Advisory in effect from 12:00 PM JST until Sunday, 12:00 AM JST.  Source: Japan Meteorological Agency, , start time: Saturday, February 28, 12:00:00 UTC, end time: Sunday, March 1, 00:00:00 UTC


Please note that weather conditions can change rapidly. For the most current information, consider checking local weather services or official meteorological agencies.
